THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF SACKETT, JOHN DEFENDANTS & CROSS-COMPLAINANTS ROBERT SIMPSON & JAMES VLAHOS ARE AWARDED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT VS. PLAINTIFF & CROSS-DEFENDANT JOHN SACKETT. $3,799.86 PRINCIPAL, $360.00 ATTORNEY FEES & $100.00 COSTS. CROSS-COMPLAINANTS ARE ALSO AWARDED STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY'S FEES AND SHALL HAVE 30 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER TO BRING A MOTION TO THIS COURT REGARDING SAME.
